project.name: Hero: Demon Tides is Giving Super Mario Odyssey a Run for Its Crown

data.label: Style
data.name: Noir Comic Book
data.description: Noir comic book illustration style. Heavy black ink lines, high contrast shading, cel-shaded shadows. Hand-drawn graphic novel aesthetic with bold outlines. Muted palette with selective color pops. Stylized, not photorealistic. No text, watermarks, speech bubbles, or white borders. Edge-to-edge composition filling the entire frame.

data.label: Action
data.content: Vibrant cel-shaded ocean scene with colorful islands in the distance, dramatic demon-shaped silhouette mid-leap above teal waters, bat wings extended, tropical sunset with neon pink and orange gradients, stylized game art aesthetic with bold outlines
